text: I was given this birth control to help stabilize my hormones to aid in clearing up my acne. I never saw a significant improvement in my acne. I suffered some very negative side effects. First, this medication made me nauseated. Secondly, and the effect that I am still trying to recover from, this medication gave me the "pregnancy mask" which is a darkening above the lip area. I was to take this birthcontrol pill daily to aid in the hormonal fluctuations that possibly were contributing to my acne.
